events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: The iconic British singer-songwriter George Michael was born on this day in 1963.

angles.name: A true pop legend
angles.copy: Thinking of the incredible George Michael, who would have been 63 today. His music still sounds as fresh as ever.

events.title: 17 years since Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: The King of Pop, Michael Jackson, passed away on this day in 2009.

angles.name: Remembering a global phenomenon
angles.copy: 17 years ago today, the world lost Michael Jackson. His unparalleled artistry continues to inspire.

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Happy birthday to the iconic Beatle
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! Keep on drumming.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Wishing a very happy birthday to the rock icon
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to Queen's magnificent Brian May! His guitar work is simply out of this world.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Still rocking at 83!
angles.copy: Can you believe Mick Jagger turns 83 today? The energy of The Rolling Stones frontman is truly legendary.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television, MTV, launched on this day in 1981 with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first video.

angles.name: The day music videos changed everything
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV burst onto our screens, forever changing how we experienced music. What was your favourite early video?

events.title: Woodstock Festival opened 57 years ago
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music and Art Fair began on this day in 1969, a legendary three-day event of peace and music.

angles.name: Remembering a defining moment of a generation
angles.copy: 57 years ago, Woodstock opened its gates for three days of peace, love, and music. A moment in history that still resonates today.

events.title: 49 years since Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: The King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, passed away on this day in 1977.

angles.name: Remembering the one and only King
angles.copy: On this day in 1977, we lost the King of Rock and Roll. Remembering the legend that is Elvis Presley.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Still defiant, still brilliant
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon who continues to inspire.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Our Kid, another year older
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that rock 'n' roll swagger.

events.title: Happy James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the release of the first Bond film, Dr. No, in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, not stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred, of course) to the world's most famous secret agent.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles co-founder John Lennon was born on this day in 1940.

angles.name: Imagine all the people...
angles.copy: Remembering the visionary John Lennon, who would have been 86 today. His message of peace and love lives on.
